scripts.down: docker compose -p casestudy-dev down 2>/dev/null; docker compose -p casestudy-prod down 2>/dev/null; docker compose -p casestudy-test down 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.clean: docker compose -p casestudy-dev down -v --rmi local 2>/dev/null; docker compose -p casestudy-prod down -v --rmi local 2>/dev/null; docker compose -p casestudy-test down -v --rmi local 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:app
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:api && npm run test:coverage:app
scripts.test:e2e: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml --env-file .env.test up --build -d && until curl -s http://localhost:3001/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done && cd e2e && API_URL=http://localhost:3001 npm test
scripts.test:e2e:ui: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml --env-file .env.test up --build -d && until curl -s http://localhost:3001/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done && cd e2e && API_URL=http://localhost:3001 npm run test:ui
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:app
scripts.format: npm run format:api && npm run format:app
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:api && npm run format:check:app && npm run format:check:e2e
scripts.audit: npm run audit:api && npm run audit:app && npm run audit:e2e
scripts.license:check: npm run license:check:api && npm run license:check:app
